ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( NOT(ISBLANK(Ownership__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Ownership1__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Ownership2__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Ownership3__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Ownership4__c)) ), ( BLANKVALUE(Ownership__c, 0) + BLANKVALUE(Ownership1__c, 0) + BLANKVALUE(Ownership2__c, 0) + BLANKVALUE(Ownership3__c, 0) + BLANKVALUE(Ownership4__c, 0) ) <> 100 )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The total ownership of individual members must equal exactly 100%. Please review and adjust the ownership percentage fields.
